compressed_prompt:
Write a plot for a story about two people who swap fingerprints. Include a title wrapped in double angular brackets, i.e. <<title>>. In your response please avoid using commas.

Write a plot for a story about two people who swap fingerprints. Include <<swapping fates>> as title. No commas in the plot.
response:
<<swapping fates>>

Two strangers meet by chance at a high-tech biotech expo. One is a disgraced forensic scientist named Elias who lost his career after a lab error. The other is a desperate thief named Mira who needs a clean slate to escape her criminal past. During a demonstration of an experimental fingerprint-altering procedure they impulsively agree to swap prints.

At first the change seems perfect. Elias uses Mira’s prints to re-enter the forensic world under a new identity. Mira wipes her record clean and starts fresh. But soon strange side effects emerge. Elias begins experiencing flashes of Mira’s memories—violent heists and betrayals—while Mira feels echoes of Elias’s guilt and regret.

As they adjust to their new lives they realize the swap was never just skin-deep. Their minds are slowly merging too. Elias starts craving the thrill of crime while Mira develops an obsession with justice. When a murder investigation links back to Mira’s old crew Elias is forced to confront the dark truth: the procedure didn’t just swap their prints—it bound their fates together forever.

Now hunted by both the law and Mira’s vengeful former allies they must decide whether to undo the swap or embrace the chaos of their shared existence. But the deeper they dig the more they question if they were ever truly separate at all.
